for direct lookup when available from prior search results.

commit.message:
feat(session-114): skeletal animation tests, CI hardening, sandbox pcall bypass fix, agent restructure

- Skeletal animation: add skeleton.h, animation_system.h/cpp (crossfade,
  STEP/LINEAR/CUBIC interpolation, root motion); 42 tests (test_skeleton.cpp),
  26 binding tests (test_animation3d_bindings.cpp); ADR adr-skeletal-animation.md
- CI hardening: ccache for all jobs, parallel builds; new jobs: ASan+UBSan
  sanitizer, clang-tidy-18, code coverage upload, Windows MinGW cross-compile;
  add .clang-tidy config and CMakePresets.json
- Scripting/security: fix pcall budget-bypass (C-side registry flag + per-instruction
  hook escalation); remove string.dump from sandbox; lobby sentinel fix;
  water getWaterConfig Lua bindings
- Renderer: shader_library expansion, mesh_loader/mesh_renderer improvements,
  water getWaterConfig API (read-modify-write setters), rhi_opengl fixes
- Core: fix ArenaAllocator aligned_alloc bug found by ASan; input WID retry logic
- Demos: breakout sfx paths + launch logic, pong fix, 3d_demo HUD cleanup +
  status bar overflow, showcase level1 water API / level2 ambient / level3
  heightScale; new 3d_feature_test example; tools/inputs/ and record_demo.sh
- Agent team: restructure from 10 agents to 5 (implementer, critic, tester,
  ops, architect); rewrite CLAUDE.md; remove deprecated agent files
- Docs: current-sprint.md, subsystem-status.md, dependency-policy.md,
  adr-retro-tier.md; update architecture-map, project-state (1616 tests), ROADMAP
- Tests total: 1616 (passing, both Clang-18 and GCC-13 clean)

commit.message:
fix: sync session tenant before PUT /admin/settings to prevent 403

The save button triggered PUT without re-syncing the session cookie,
so x-session-tenant-id could be stale (default) while the URL query
had the real tenant, causing checkTenantMismatch to return 403.
Now handleSave calls /api/auth/me?tenantId= first to re-sign the
session cookie before the PUT request.

commit.message:
fix: 조회수 IP 중복방지 Redis 전환 (HPA pod 간 공유) (#413)

## Summary
- 조회수 IP 기반 중복방지를 인메모리 Map에서 Redis SETEX로 전환
- K8s HPA 환경(4-12 pod)에서 새로고침 시 다른 pod 라우팅으로 조회수가 무한 증가하던 버그 수정
- Redis 키: `vc:{ip}:{boardId}:{postId}`, TTL 10분
- Redis 장애 시 graceful fallback (조회수 약간 늘어날 수 있으나 크래시 없음)

## Test plan
- [x] `pnpm build` 성공
- [x] dev.damoang.net 게시글 페이지 200 정상 응답
- [ ] 운영 배포 후 조회수 증가 패턴 모니터링

feat(skills): add shared skills role with Shortcut skill for all models (#7)

* feat(skills): add shared skills role with Shortcut skill for all models

Introduces roles/skills/ as a new Ansible role that deploys shared AI
agent skills to Claude, Qwen, and Gemini. The Shortcut skill provides
native skill discovery via SKILL.md frontmatter and downloads the
Shortcut OpenAPI 3.0 spec dynamically from developer.shortcut.com at
deploy time — no auth required, always current.

Also removes the Shortcut MCP server from all model settings.json files
(replaced by the lighter-weight native skill + short CLI approach) and
fixes copy module src paths in claude, qwen, and gemini task files that
caused double role-prefix resolution errors.

Signed-off-by: Muhammad Hamadto <github.stencil525@passmail.net>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(skills): add shortcut-to-vibe skill for importing stories into VibeKanban

New skill that gives all models (Claude, Qwen, Gemini) a concrete playbook
for importing Shortcut stories into VibeKanban: fetch via short CLI, discover
the target project via vibe_kanban MCP, map priority, and bulk-create issues
with traceability links back to Shortcut. Supports flat import and epic
hierarchy via parent_issue_id.

Signed-off-by: Muhammad Hamadto <github.stencil525@passmail.net>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(skills): update shortcut-to-vibe to use VibeKanban REST API

Replace vibe_kanban MCP approach with direct REST API calls (/api/tasks).
The MCP server fails to discover the VibeKanban port when it changes on
each restart. The REST API is more reliable and needs no MCP config.
Also adds deduplication check and clearer instructions for URL extraction.

Signed-off-by: Muhammad Hamadto <github.stencil525@passmail.net>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(skills): add all/me/story/epic import modes to shortcut-to-vibe skill

Structured skill into four explicit import modes: all stories, my stories,
single story by ID/URL, and epic by ID/URL with all child stories imported
as sub-issues via parent_issue_id. Also fixes the VibeKanban API call to
include required remote project fields (status_id, sort_order,
extension_metadata).

Signed-off-by: Muhammad Hamadto <github.stencil525@passmail.net>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(skills): add github-issue-to-vibe skill for importing GitHub issues into VibeKanban

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

  and item_sub_categories to handle cross-tenant unique constraint conflicts

  when tenant-specific lookup returns incomplete results

feat(sprint-4): suspicious rating detection + volunteer inspection tasks

- Anomaly detection algorithm (detectAnomaly, pickNearestVolunteer) in src/lib/
- Auto-trigger on every review POST: SUDDEN_DROP/SPIKE >= 2 stars triggers task
- New API routes: GET/POST /api/tasks, PATCH /api/tasks/[id]
- Admin panel: new "Alerty" tab with active inspection tasks + badge in overview
- Volunteer dashboard: "Zlecone kontrole" section - accept task, open inline ReviewForm
- ReviewForm: optional taskId prop marks task COMPLETED after inspection review submit
- Mock volunteers in data/volunteers.json (anna@example.com as v1)

- Added 10 more shelters in Trójmiasto area (Pruszcz, Wejherowo, Tczew, Kartuzy, Puck, Żukowo, Rotmanka, Kolbudy, Łęczyce) — 20 total

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix magpie_dim mismatch: load data at max dim, slice per-model

V12.41 was trained post-JARVIS with 151 magpie features, but
load_data() hardcoded magpie_dim=145, causing RuntimeError on
the linear layer (1024x145 vs 151x512).

Fix: load data at max(both models' magpie_dim), then slice to
each model's expected dim in encode_all(), encode_indices(), and
search_single_target_compact(). Handles any combination of models
trained on different feature sets.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add manual frontmatter parser for early component loading

ComponentLoader.parseComponentFile relied on app.metadataCache which
isn't ready during onload(). Added parseFrontmatterManual() that
extracts YAML frontmatter with a simple regex parser, stripping it
before transpilation.

Load strategy: load eagerly in onload() with manual FM parsing,
then reload in onLayoutReady() with full metadata cache for accuracy.
